metadata.description: SPADES Framework marketplace — two sister plugins: `spades` for coding harnesses (Claude Code, Cursor) and `spades-anywhere` for non-coding agents (Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, web/mobile). Same six-phase loop, same artefact shape, same backends; different runtimes.

plugins.name: spades
plugins.description: Scope, Plan, Approve, Do, Evaluate, Ship — six-phase loop with a Project layer and pluggable backends (Linear MCP, local filesystem, more). 16 skills and 5 agents (4 reviewer personas + 1 researcher). Pure Markdown, no bash, no external setup.

plugins.name: spades-anywhere
plugins.description: SPADES for non-coding agents — same six-phase loop, same Linear/local backends, same HTML mode, but adapted for real-world human tasks rather than code work. Runs in Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, the Claude web app, and mobile clients. No SCM, no PR lifecycle.
